Itemized  ·  Procedures  ·  Ureteroscopy with lithotripsy (kidney stone)  ·  California

Ureteroscopy with lithotripsy (kidney stone) cost in California.

Cash-pay range for ureteroscopy with lithotripsy (kidney stone) across 37 hospitals in California: $171 to $24,541. CPT code 52353. Pulled from each hospital's federally-mandated price transparency file.

Cheapest in California
$171
Providence Saint Joseph (Burbank)
Los Angeles, CA

UC San Diego Health
San Diego, CA
